title: Enriched Log
description: Contract for the enriched-logs Kafka topic. Produced by Flink ETL / Bridge after OTLP parsing and attribute flattening.

@timestamp.description: Primary timestamp (ISO-8601). Mapped as OpenSearch date field.

log_id.description: Deterministic UUID5 derived from trace_id|span_id|@timestamp. Deduplication key.

level.description: Log severity. OTLP CRITICAL is normalized to FATAL.

observed_timestamp.description: When the collector observed the log (OTLP observedTimeUnixNano).

ingest_timestamp.description: When the ETL pipeline processed this log.

environment.description: Deployment environment (e.g. production, staging). Falls back to tenant_id.

trace_id.description: W3C trace ID for distributed tracing correlation.

anomaly_score.description: ML-assigned anomaly score (0.0–1.0). Added by enrichment job.

ml_features.description: Feature vector used by the ML model. Added by enrichment job.

enriched_at.description: When the enrichment job processed this log.

field_conventions.otlp_log_attributes: flattened to top-level, dots replaced with underscores
field_conventions.otlp_resource_attributes: flattened with resource_ prefix, dots replaced with underscores
